raw_consumer_statement: I am reaching out due to 3 different disputes with 2 being from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, on XX/XX/year> ( {$1100.00} ) and XX/XX/year> ( {$1200.00} ) The investigation of the dispute was not clear and did not end properly and AMEX denied my claim. I got my some work done to my car including a new radiator and oil change, etc, and a couple days later my car broke down and I called the shop to see what happened but they couldn't resolve my issue and said it was my fault. I used my AMEX card and AMEX couldn't resolve this issue either. The other one is another dispute with AMEX and it was on XX/XX/year> for XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX ( {$2700.00} ). I bought a set of XXXX XXXX and I returned it a couple days later to the exact same store. The store said the issued credit will come onto my card but till this day it has not yet been received. I called AMEX and XXXX XXXX XXXX trying to get this resolved but neither parties could not help me. Please, it's been a while since these issues have happened, but this is causing me a headache and my only hope is to contact the CFPB.
